_comment: Vector-RAG over your Obsidian vault, exposed to the agent as MCP tools. The bot's Claude Agent SDK launches this server and uses its search/read tools to ground replies. Swap the package/args for your chosen server: obsidian-notes-rag, vault-mcp, or mcp-obsidian (Local REST API variant). VAULT_PATH must point at the vault mounted into the bot container (see docker-compose.override.yml).
